summary: Bridge-free reviewed the running det=1.25 MHz Ramsey autosave at 7/16 completed averages. Used the first 6 averages for snake-order balance (300k/800k planned shots per point), found no drift flags, no monitor error, no stop request, and no bridge queue mutation. Provisional readout2/self-baseline FFT target bins were direct 13C 0.13%, det-13C 1.13%, carrier 1.40%, det+13C 1.10%, old det=1 high/static 0.50%, static low 0.65%, previous 1.9 MHz 0.64%. No T2star or 13C claim was made; project state, evidence, lab log, and backlog were updated.

next_action.detail: Do not mutate the bridge queue while the job is running. Review a later useful even autosave subset bridge-free, or perform terminal raw export/drift/plot/review when the job completes.
